headline: BRMSTE · quantum job accounting → USDC settle
definition: Ties BRMSTE quantum compute (cuQuantum GPU + Qiskit IBM Runtime) to the USDC payment rail. Each quantum job's compute is metered and settled in USDC over the openUSD/Coinbase rail; contributed quantum/GPU compute earns on the edge burn=earn mechanic. Agents meter and settle; agents are never in the transaction and hold no keys.

metering.note: compute metered from job telemetry; priced in USDC

burn_earn.meaning: GPU/QPU compute burned on a quantum job mints an equal earned USDA credit to the contributor
